body:
- Add pino + pino-http logger middleware with request ID support and redaction.
- Wire logger middleware into backend app startup.
- Add CardGame/docs/logger.md documenting manual logging API.

reviews.body:
The implementation looks solid — log level routing, header redaction, and request ID generation are all well thought out.

One thing worth a follow-up issue: the log file path is hardcoded relative to src/middleware/ and the filename has no date rotation. Long-running instances will produce a single unbounded .log file. Consider making the destination configurable via LOG_FILE env var and adding it to .env.example.

Also, minor: missing newline at end of logger.js.

title: feat: add pino HTTP logger and logging docs
